title: theophrasta rodekiana
side_effects: Theophrasta rodekiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. Prolonged exposure to its volatile oils can cause headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In severe cases, ingesting the plant can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and even liver damage. Improper handling of the plant can also cause skin burns and blisters due to its potent sap.
